initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT
  i_brand,
  i_category,
  s_store_type,
  SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM
  store_sales,
  item,
  store,
  date_dim
WHERE
  store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
  AND store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
  AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
GROUP BY
  i_brand,
  i_category,
  s_store_type
ORDER BY
  total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100
initial_candidates.exec_error:

Candidate bindings: "s_street_type", "s_store_name", "s_store_id", "s_store_sk", "s_street_name"

           ^
